metadata.description: A female-presenting individual in their 40s has fair, smooth skin with minimal visible texture, and a subtly oval face with a soft jawline. Her reddish-brown hair is shoulder-length, wavy, and styled with a side part, framing her face. Her striking green eyes are almond-shaped and set slightly wide apart, complemented by medium-thick, gently arched eyebrows. She has a straight nose with a defined bridge and a rounded tip, and her lips are medium thickness with a natural, soft curve. Fine lines are visible around her eyes and forehead, and her head is angled directly forward with a neutral, calm expression.
